sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83417" key="plada/rwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πλᾰδᾰ´ρ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n83417.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">becoming 'splashy'</tr_>, of the stomach, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0733.tlg001:42" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cass.Fel.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">42</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
